playbook.intent: From request to ready-to-ship slice: signal validated, MVP cut to bone, spec written, flag plan decided, success metric defined — all before any code is generated.
playbook.scope: From request to ready-to-ship slice: signal validated, MVP cut to bone, spec written, flag plan decided, success metric defined — all before any code is generated.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Validate the request
stage.intent: Confirm the signal is real, not vocal-minority.

tasks.task: Count how many users asked for this in the last 30 days
Run 2 quick Mom-test calls if signal is thin
Tag the JTBD this feature touches

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when signal >=3 distinct users OR clear JTBD match.

stage.name: Cut to the bone
stage.intent: Find the smallest scope that delivers the JTBD.

tasks.task: List the full feature surface as imagined
Cut to a micro-MVP that delivers the JTBD
Capture explicit non-goals

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when scope fits in 1 page AND cuts >=50% of original surface.

stage.name: Write the spec
stage.intent: Write the spec with acceptance criteria.

tasks.task: Use the spec-structure template
Define acceptance criteria per AC line
List dependencies and risks

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every AC is testable.

stage.name: Flag plan
stage.intent: Decide the rollout shape before code.

tasks.task: Pick the feature-flag strategy (canary / all-users / off)
Define the kill-switch trigger
Document the rollback path

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when there is a documented rollback in <=15 minutes.

stage.name: Success metric
stage.intent: Define how you will know it worked.

tasks.task: Pick one north-star metric that should move
Set the threshold for this was worth it
Wire metrics in the spec

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a single north-star metric committed.

stage.name: Build-or-waitlist gate
stage.intent: Confirm we are actually building, not waitlisting.

tasks.task: Compare effort to other top-3 outcomes
Decide build-now / waitlist / cut
Write the rationale

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when the call is committed in writing.

stage.name: Schedule + briefing pack
stage.intent: Hand the spec to the executor (you or AI agent).

tasks.task: Prepare the agent briefing pack (spec + context + tests)
Schedule the build slot
Pre-load the first task file

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when the next slot is on the calendar and pre-loaded.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content new-feature-scoping-session-per-feature-on-demand --format md, agent: faion get-content new-feature-scoping-session-per-feature-on-demand --format context, json: faion get-content new-feature-scoping-session-per-feature-on-demand --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
